aeo_readiness.summary: The website has minimal AEO readiness with a lack of structured data, inconsistent NAP, and limited content depth.
quick_wins: Implement schema markup to provide search engines with structured data about the business.
Ensure consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) across the website and online directories.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, customer testimonials, and a blog section.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) placeholder with no reviews and incomplete information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not fully optimized, lacking reviews, photos, and detailed business information.
critical_issues: Incomplete business information (e.g., hours of operation, services).
Lack of photos and virtual tours.

nap_citations.summary: NAP citations are inconsistent and limited across the web, impacting local search visibility.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information on major directories (e.g., Yelp, Yellow Pages, Bing Places).
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media profiles.
Encourage customers to leave reviews on authoritative platforms to boost local search presence.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and content depth
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Voice search and AI-driven search features
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement schema markup and expand website content
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Engage with local community and industry forums to build online authority and backlinks
